title: Thermodynamics
shortSummary: Heat, temperature, entropy, and the laws that govern energy transfer — why perpetual motion machines are impossible and why your coffee goes cold.
whyItMatters: Thermodynamics governs engines, refrigerators, stars, and chemical reactions. The second law — entropy always increases — is one of the most profound statements in all of science. It sets the direction of time itself.
coreConcepts: The zeroth, first, second, and third laws
